log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Hexblood — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Hexblood — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Hexblood — Armored Tank.
→ Hexblood — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 27/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Hexblood — Armored Tank --- HP: 27/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Hexblood — Armored Tank: FAIL! 27 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 1 ══
